arts.ttl: Ipswich Town target Ryan Oné amid fears of losing Liam Delap
arts.sum: Sheffield United forward Ryan One is being eyed by Ipswich Town as a potential option to go for in case they lose Liam Delap this summer, according to Fabrizio Romano.
